title: Luffy Refuses Her Plan
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on luffy refuses her plan, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Luffy Refuses Her Plan. Luffy refuses to let Vivi carry the country alone, forcing her to face what it will actually take to stop Crocodile. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you're talking about these people,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then I defi- nitely met them!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: And Miss Wedn- Essday, a.k.a. prin-cess viv!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: These people were my enemies all along!?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: They'll become a thorn in our sides if we leave them alone.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And as Mr. 3 pointed out, there seems to be one man and one animal,

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: That our intelligence hasn't accounted for...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: And they're most likely somewhere in this country by now.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Mr. 2, use your memory skill to get those faces you just showed onto photos...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: please, boss! I swear to you that this time I'll finish them off,

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: If you give me a 2nd cha-

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Shut up, you income- tent buffoon!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you know why I made you Mr. 3,

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Despite the fact that you're inferior to Mr. 4 in terms of combat ability!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: It's because I assumed your cowardly but cunning ways would help you achieve success!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: You disappoint me... There's nothing more worthless than someone who can't pull through when it matters the most...!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Drink as much water as you like...

summary: This part develops luffy refuses her plan and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
